channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop quality Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, sherwanis, anarkali suits, and jewelry at LuxeMia. Flat rate shipping $25 per order, free on orders over $350.

item.g:title: Maroon Embroidered Velvet Indo Western for South Asian Weddings — Red (LXM-WS-072-XS)
item.g:description: Maroon Embroidered Velvet Indo Western for South Asian Weddings brings a refined LuxeMia finish to classic Indian ethnic wear, pairing a memorable maroon palette with a silhouette made for elegant occasion dressing.Style it for weddings, receptions, engagements, festive celebrations, and family events where polished South Asian menswear feels right. item.g:title: Mustard Embroidered Shimmer Silk Palazzo Suit for Wedding Guests
item.g:description: Shop the Mustard Embroidered Shimmer Silk Palazzo Suit for Wedding Guests at LuxeMia — a Red wedding suit in Shimmer Silk with embroidery. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez paired with palazzo bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with embroidery to complete the ensemble. The kameez features embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the palazzo provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for festive celebrations, this wedding suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a maang tikka and embroidered juttis for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48) with custom tailoring options. Choose Unstitched (fabric and trims for your own tailor), Ready to Wear (pre-stitched to standard sizes), or Made to Measure (stitched to your exact body measurements — we will email a measurement form after checkout). Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. Color: Red | Fabric: Shimmer Silk | Work: Embroidery | Bottom: Palazzo | Occasion: Festive celebrations Free shipping on orders over $350 to the USA, Canada, and Australia. Flat $25 shipping on orders under $350.

Design Details Fabric: Premium Georgette known for its elegant sheen and comfortable drape. Work: Intricate Embroidery Work showcasing skilled hand craftsmanship. Lehenga Silhouette: Beautifully flared lehenga with a voluminous circular silhouette that creates graceful movement as you walk. Blouse/Choli: Matching Georgette blouse piece with complementary embroidery work detailing. Can be customized to your preferred neckline and sleeve style. Dupatta: Festive matching dupatta in Georgette with coordinated embroidery work and an ornate border. Lining: Soft cotton or satin lining for all-day comfort. Closure: Hook-and-eye with drawstring waistband for a secure, adjustable fit. Flair: Generous flare that creates a stunning silhouette. Styling Tips Style this teal blue lehenga choli with statement jewelry — a choker necklace or layered necklaces with matching earrings work beautifully. Complete the look with embellished heels and a decorated clutch. For festivals and cultural events, opt for an elegant updo or soft waves, and consider a maang tikka for a traditional touch. Stitching Options Ready-Made: Stitched and ready to wear. Available in standard sizes XS through 3XL. Custom Stitching: Provide your measurements for a tailored fit. Standard customization available. Custom Sizing: Available in all sizes including plus sizes. Blouse Customization: Choose your preferred neckline, sleeve length, and blouse length. Size Variants Available in sizes XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, 3XL, and Custom Size. Custom sizing is available — provide your measurements at checkout for a tailored fit. Plus-size friendly. Size Chart Refer to the size chart below to find your perfect fit. All measurements are in inches. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez with coordinated bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with zari threadwork to complete the ensemble. The kameez features zari threadwork on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the coordinated bottom provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for special occasions, this anarkali suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a statement necklace and kolhapuri sandals for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. item.g:title: Pink Fendi Silk Embroidery Lehenga Choli
item.g:description: Product Overview This Pink lehenga choli in Fendi Silk is a perfect pick for your next special occasion. Featuring beautiful embroidery work, this outfit brings together traditional craftsmanship and modern design. The premium Fendi Silk fabric offers a graceful drape and comfortable fit, making it ideal for all-day wear. Design Details Fabric: Premium Fendi Silk known for its lightweight feel, elegant sheen, and comfortable drape. Work: Intricate Embroidery Work showcasing skilled hand craftsmanship. Silhouette: Flared lehenga skirt paired with a matching choli and dupatta. The voluminous silhouette creates a stunning bridal or festive look with beautiful movement. Neckline: Round neckline adorned with intricate embroidery that frames the face beautifully. Sleeves: Elegant full sleeves in Fendi Silk that complement the overall design. Dupatta: Comes with a matching fendi silk dupatta in pink featuring coordinated embroidery detailing. The dupatta length is approximately 2.25 meters, offering versatile draping options. Bottom: Voluminous lehenga skirt in fendi silk with a tailored waistband. Designed to flare beautifully and create stunning movement as you walk. Styling Tips Style this pink lehenga choli with gold or silver statement earrings and matching heels for a polished look at celebrations and gatherings. A sleek clutch and soft waves or a neat bun will complete the ensemble. For a more traditional touch, add bangles and a delicate necklace set. Stitching Options Ready-Made: Stitched and ready to wear. Available in standard sizes XS through 3XL. Select your size at checkout. Custom Stitching: Provide your measurements and our expert tailors will craft the outfit to your exact specifications. Includes standard customization at no extra cost. Custom Sizing: Available in all sizes including plus sizes. We accommodate every body type with our made-to-measure service. Size Variants Available in sizes XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, and 3XL. Custom sizing is available — provide your measurements at checkout for a tailored fit. Plus-size friendly. Size Chart Refer to the size chart below to find your perfect fit. All measurements are in inches. Size Bust (inches) Waist (inches) Hip (inches) XS 32 26 34 S 34 28 36 M 36 30 38 L 38 32 40 XL 40 34 42 2XL 42 36 44 3XL 44 38 46 Custom Provide your measurements at checkout Color: Pink

Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez paired with palazzo bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with embroidery to complete the ensemble. The kameez features embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the palazzo provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for special occasions, this palazzo suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a statement necklace and kolhapuri sandals for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. item.g:title: Embroidery Work Sharara Set in Georgette Silk — Baby Pink
item.g:description: Shop the Embroidery Work Sharara Set in Georgette Silk — Baby Pink at LuxeMia — a Baby Pink sharara set in Silk with embroidery. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez paired with sharara bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with embroidery to complete the ensemble. The kameez features embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the sharara provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for casual and everyday occasions, this sharara set ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a maang tikka and embroidered juttis for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a semi-stitched suit — partially tailored with adjustable seams for a customized fit. Minor alterations can be made by your local tailor for the perfect silhouette. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48). Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery.
